response.justification: Bogdan is a versatile, hands-on engineer with roughly 15+ years of experience spanning web, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems, and he meets the baseline qualifications on tenure, languages, and a CS degree. However, the role is a Principal (IC6) position centered on experimentation, growth measurement, telemetry, and statistical analysis at enterprise scale, and his resume shows no experimentation platform, A/B testing, metrics infrastructure, or growth engineering experience. His career trajectory is predominantly senior-level IC work at small-to-mid-size companies, without evidence of the multi-team, multi-workstream architectural leadership this level demands.
strengths: 15+ years of broad, hands-on engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Real high-scale systems exposure: low-latency microservices handling millions of HTTP requests per second at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
Recent AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work aligns with the preferred AI-accelerated engineering qualification
concerns: No experimentation, A/B testing, feature-flagging, or growth measurement platform experience — the core domain of the role
No demonstrated principal-level scope: leading multi-workstream initiatives across teams and products at enterprise scale
Limited evidence of telemetry, metrics infrastructure, or statistical analysis work required for high data aptitude

key_factors.factor: Strong general engineering breadth and high-scale systems background
